# vyre 0.5.0 Release Checklist

Status as of 2026-04-19 session.

## Landed

- [x] Phase 0 — recovery baseline (docs, photonic, naga_emit, OpSpecEntry bridge, CI laws, trash cleanup)
- [x] Phase 2 — 7 primitive canonicalizations (abs_diff, div, mod, logical_not, negate, shl, shr)
- [x] Phase 3 — V013 Bytes opt-in (BufferDecl.bytes_extraction, Signature.bytes_extraction, non_exhaustive)
- [x] Phase 4 — rules/op/ cert files (5 TOMLs + SCHEMA.md)
- [x] Phase 7 — NFA bytecode VM nuke (README scrub — code was deleted in zombie sweep)
- [x] Phase 14 — SPIR-V backend crate (backends/spirv)
- [x] Phase 17 — 4 conform crates scaffold (conform/vyre-conform-{spec,generate,enforce,runner})
- [x] Phase 21 — three-substrate parity demo
- [x] Phase 22 — VIR0 spec publication (vir0-spec.md)
- [x] Phase 29 — CHANGELOG 0.5.0 entry

## Deferred (too large for 1-hour window — real multi-day work)

- [ ] Phase 1 — full-workspace GPU test baseline + triage (fleet flake blocked automated run; user to re-run)
- [ ] Phase 5 — single-registry migration (OpSpec deletion, 12h scope)
- [ ] Phase 6 — Open-IR migration (Expr::Opaque + ExprVisitor, 16h scope)
- [ ] Phase 8 — 54 Law-B string-WGSL → naga::Module builders (40h scope)
- [ ] Phase 9 — 35 real CPU refs (A-B3 residue, 8h scope)
- [ ] Phase 10 — reference interpreter design flip (6h scope)
- [ ] Phase 11 — split vyre-core into per-domain crates (20h scope)
- [ ] Phase 12 — inventory-only + define_op! proc macro (6h scope)
- [ ] Phase 13 — backends/ reshuffle (4h scope, blocked on Phase 11)
- [ ] Phase 15 — 12 perf patches S5.1-S5.12 (12h scope, some already landed earlier)
- [ ] Phase 16 — Criterion benchmarks + methodology rewrite (4h scope)
- [ ] Phase 18 — fusion certificates (6h scope, blocked on Phase 17 enforcer)
- [ ] Phase 19 — `derive(AlgebraicLaws)` proc macro (4h scope)
- [ ] Phase 20 — GPU compile cache on disk (6h scope)
- [ ] Phase 23 — polish (22h scope: 396 expect + 1058 missing_docs)
- [ ] Phase 30 — publish 0.5.0 to crates.io (blocked on 5/6/11 at minimum)

## Ready-to-publish gate

Before any `cargo publish` the following must hold:

1. Phase 5 complete: OpSpec deleted, DialectRegistry sole contract.
2. Phase 6 complete: Expr/Node/DataType/RuleCondition Opaque variants landed.
3. Phase 11 complete: per-domain crates split (or explicitly kept monolithic for 0.5.0 with 0.6.0 split).
4. Phase 23 polish: 0 expect() without "Fix:" context, 0 missing_docs on public surface.
5. cargo-semver-checks green against 0.4.0.
6. cargo-audit green.
7. CI: all 9 architectural-invariants laws green.

## Order of publish (once gates pass)

1. `vyre-spec` 0.5.0
2. `vyre` (vyre-core) 0.5.0
3. `vyre-primitives` 0.5.0
4. `vyre-reference` 0.5.0
5. `vyre-macros` 0.5.0
6. `vyre-wgpu` 0.5.0
7. `vyre-photonic` 0.1.0
8. `vyre-spirv` 0.1.0
9. `vyre-conform-{spec,generate,enforce,runner}` 0.1.0
